name: select
visual_summary: This is a dropdown select component that allows users to choose one item from a list. It is used to filter or select an option from a large set of possibilities, and is typically rendered as a dropdown box with a highlighted active selection and a list of options below. A developer would use this component to provide users with a concise way to select one option from a set of predefined choices.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready select component with the following characteristics:

Name: select
Description: This is a dropdown select component that allows users to choose one item from a list. It is used to filter or select an option from a large set of possibilities, and is typically rendered as a dropdown box with a highlighted active selection and a list of options below. A developer would use this component to provide users with a concise way to select one option from a set of predefined choices.
Style: minimal, flat
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: select, dropdown, options, choice

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// elements/select.html
<div x-data="{
        selectOpen: false,
        selectedItem: '',
        selectableItems: [
            {
                title: 'Milk',
                value: 'milk',
                disabled: false
            },
            {
                title: 'Eggs',
                value: 'eggs',
                disabled: false
            },
            {
                title: 'Cheese',
                value: 'cheese',
                disabled: false
            },
